description: Design polish overhaul: fix broken blog prose, warm-tint color tokens, add mobile nav, differentiate card interactions, redesign homepage layout, create proper footer, add Easter eggs

userStories.title: Install @tailwindcss/typography and configure prose styling
userStories.description: As a visitor reading blog posts, I want properly styled prose so paragraphs have spacing, lists have markers, blockquotes look distinct, and the text is readable.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `pnpm add @tailwindcss/typography`
Add `@plugin '@tailwindcss/typography';` to `src/styles/globals.css` after the existing `@plugin 'tailwindcss-animate';`

Add prose customization in `@layer base` in globals.css: .prose vars (--tw-prose-body: var(--foreground), --tw-prose-headings: var(--foreground), --tw-prose-links: var(--primary), --tw-prose-bold: var(--foreground), --tw-prose-bullets: var(--primary), --tw-prose-code: var(--foreground), max-width: 65ch)
Add `.prose h2 { @apply font-oswald tracking-tight; }`
Add `.prose a { @apply text-primary decoration-primary/40 underline-offset-2 hover:decoration-primary; }`
Add `.prose code { @apply font-mono rounded bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 text-sm; }`
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
`pnpm lint` passes
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes (use this instead of pnpm build — worktree has no database for prerender)
userStories.notes: This is the highest-impact fix — 10+ blog posts use prose classes with no plugin installed.

userStories.title: Fix text-4xl on FavoriteTech labels
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want tech icon labels to be subordinate to the icons, not dominating them at 2.25rem.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/components/favorite-tech.tsx` line 57, change `className="text-4xl"` to `className="text-sm font-medium"`
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes (use this instead of pnpm build — worktree has no database for prerender)

userStories.title: Warm-tint neutral color tokens
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want the site's cards, borders, and muted elements to feel cohesive with the warm cream background, not cold gray.
acceptanceCriteria: In `src/styles/globals.css` `:root` light mode: --card: hsl(36, 16%, 99%), --card-foreground: hsl(23, 8%, 8%), --popover: hsl(36, 16%, 99%), --popover-foreground: hsl(23, 8%, 8%), --muted: hsl(30, 10%, 95%), --muted-foreground: hsl(23, 4%, 45%), --accent: hsl(30, 10%, 95%), --accent-foreground: hsl(23, 6%, 12%), --border: hsl(30, 8%, 88%), --input: hsl(30, 8%, 88%)

In `src/styles/globals.css` `.dark` mode: --card: hsl(240, 8%, 7%), --card-foreground: hsl(36, 18%, 95%), --popover: hsl(240, 8%, 7%), --popover-foreground: hsl(36, 18%, 95%), --muted: hsl(240, 6%, 16%), --muted-foreground: hsl(36, 10%, 65%), --accent: hsl(240, 6%, 16%), --accent-foreground: hsl(36, 18%, 95%), --border: hsl(240, 6%, 18%), --input: hsl(240, 6%, 18%)
`npx tsc --noEmit` passes (use this instead of pnpm build — worktree has no database for prerender)
userStories.notes: No pure gray hsl(0, 0%, ...) should remain in themed token variables after this.

userStories.title: Page transitions
